name: Millie's Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Stir together the dry ingredients and spices in a large bowl.
Cream butter and honey until smooth.
Beat in egg until combined.
Add mashed pumpkin (the mixture may look unusual).
Mix in the dry ingredients, then stir in nuts and dried fruit.
Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls onto an oiled cookie sheet.
Bake at 325°F for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
For pumpkin bars, use an 8x8 inch oiled pan and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes. You can substitute yams or winter squash for the pumpkin if desired.
